lessons.title: My Mother and Father
lessons.topic: Core family and sounds of U and V

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is wearing a red hat in the video?
questions.hint: He wears it when he goes outside.

questions.question_text: What instrument does big sister play?
questions.hint: It's a string instrument she holds under her chin.

questions.question_text: Who helps big brother with homework in the video?
questions.hint: She is seen sitting at the table with him.

steps.title: Family Day
steps.text: This is my mother. She has a yellow umbrella. My father drives a big van. At home, we laugh together. This is a happy day for our class.

questions.question: What color is the mother's umbrella?
Who drives the van?
questions.locate_text: My father drives a big van.

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show something you own.

steps.audio_text: Hi there! I'm with my father. We are driving our van to the park, and my father is holding our green umbrella.

questions.question: Who is with the speaker in the van?

questions.question_text: This is my ___ (Vocabulary question)
Which vehicle do we drive to the park? (Reading comprehension question)
This is my ___ van. (Grammar question)
True or False: A 'mother' is part of the family.
What do we use to stay dry in the rain? (Vocabulary question)

lessons.title: Brother and Sister
lessons.topic: Siblings and sounds of W and X

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is wearing the striped shirt?
questions.hint: Look for a boy with stripes on his shirt.

questions.question_text: What game are the children playing?
questions.hint: They are looking for a hiding friend.

questions.question_text: What sound does the word 'brother' start with?
questions.hint: It's the same sound as in 'ball'.

steps.title: Our Family Day
steps.text: This is my brother. My brother has a big box. My sister is here. She is looking at her watch. We are playing together! This is a happy day for our class.

questions.question: What does the brother have?
questions.locate_text: My brother has a big box.

questions.question: Who is looking at a watch?
questions.locate_text: My sister is here. She is looking at her watch.

steps.explanation: Use this to show your family.

steps.audio_text: This is my sister. She has a red box with a yellow watch inside. My brother thinks it's very fun.

questions.question: What color is the sister's watch?
What does the sister keep in the box?

questions.question_text: I have a ___ watch. (Grammar question)
Which word means brother's sibling? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Watch' starts with a W sound.
What does Ben have in his box? (Reading comprehension)
Fill in: My ___ is my best friend.

lessons.title: Grandpa and Baby
lessons.topic: Extended family and sounds of Y and Z

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal does Baby like to see at the zoo? 🦓
questions.hint: It has black and white stripes.

questions.question_text: What sound does the lion make in the video? 🦁
questions.hint: It's a loud sound from the king of the jungle.

questions.question_text: What fruit does Grandpa use to make a funny sound? 🍎
questions.hint: It's a red fruit and makes a crunch.

steps.title: Family Fun Day
steps.text: This is my grandpa. He plays with a yo-yo. My grandma gives me a zebra toy. The baby laughs. We all have fun! This is a happy day for our class.

questions.question: Who gives the zebra toy?
questions.locate_text: My grandma gives me a zebra toy.

steps.explanation: Use this to talk about family.

steps.audio_text: This is my grandma. She reads a book to me about zebras. My grandpa likes to play with his yo-yo. We have fun together in the park.

questions.question: What does grandpa like to play with?
What animal is in grandma's book?

questions.question_text: My grandpa is ___ at the park. (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: My grandma is ___ happy. (Grammar question)
What does grandpa play with? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: Zebras are in grandma's book.
Which sound is like the letter 'Y'? (Phonics question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal has stripes and likes to eat grass?
questions.hint: This animal looks a bit like a horse but with black and white stripes.

questions.question_text: Who is the person that loves to sing you lullabies at night?
questions.hint: This person takes care of you and lives with you at home.

questions.question_text: What do you see in the sky at night shining bright?
questions.hint: These twinkle and can be seen in the dark sky when the moon is out.

steps.title: Lily's Family Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Lily. This is my mother and father. I have a big brother. My grandma is here. We have a blue car. I am excited!

questions.question: Does Lily have a brother?
questions.locate_text: I am Lily. This is my mother and father.

steps.audio_text: This is my mom. She is reading a big blue book. My sister is drawing with her red crayons.

questions.question: What color are the crayons my sister is using?

steps.expected_text: this is my mother and this is my father

questions.question_text: This is ___ dad. (Grammar question)
What fruit is yellow and curved? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: My brother is playing with a yellow toy.
Which one is a family member? (Reading comprehension)
I have a ___ cat. (Grammar question)
